race.comment: KING MAYWIN (10) clearly on top. He was dominant winning by 4 lengths at today's track and distance last time out to build on a solid first-up result. Clearly relished the synthetic there and is well placed to repeat the dose in what looks another winnable affair. MILITARY BASE (13) tackled city class latest when fifth at Sandown-Lakeside, finishing 5 lengths from the winner. Better placed here and should be right there in the finish.  SAVANNAH CHILL (12) has been fair in two runs back but both have been on heavy tracks which she doesn't appear to appreciate. She could be an improver up in trip from an ideal gate. BANKNOTE HUSTLER (1) will find this a fair bit easier than last time in Sydney and is worth respecting.
